quote: Sometimes, look up at the sky. Who wouldn’t feel better getting lost in blue?
author: Motino Originals

quote: A little rain, then sunlight. Life moves like that. Seasons change, hope blooms again, and the story continues.
author: Motino Originals

quote: Yesterday I looked at the sky. Summer insists on arriving, while I am still in spring.
author: Motino Originals

quote: Life is a painting. Graceful. Still. Quietly beautiful.
author: Motino Originals

quote: It is time to thank, once again, everything that makes life meaningful.
author: Motino Originals

quote: All wishes belong to the blue. With it, one kind of longing. Without it, another.
author: Motino Originals

quote: At the edge of life, to see beautiful days, you must first imagine them.
author: Motino Originals

quote: Songs that understand you stay on your lips. You move between dreaming and not dreaming. That is how waiting begins.
author: Motino Originals

quote: Some things begin. Some things end. That is how certain stories start. The details belong to those who lived them.
author: Motino Originals

quote: Good morning, world. To a bright and beautiful day.
author: Motino Originals

quote: In the end, what awaits you may be magnificent. We are passing through beautiful times—the ones we always believed would come.
author: Motino Originals

quote: When you cannot find the end of the maze, the universe notices. It pours light over you. Because despite life, you are still a mysterious hero.
author: Motino Originals

quote: A new week begins with new hopes, without giving too much meaning to what stayed behind.
author: Motino Originals

quote: A new country is discovering yourself. Being alone with who you are. Breaking old limits and building better ones.
author: Motino Originals

quote: Listening to yourself in the crowd—quietly, calmly, peacefully. A beautiful way to begin the day.
author: Motino Originals

quote: When April arrives, I remember spring, hope, and not giving up. Even the city whispers: welcome back. Everything begins now.
author: Motino Originals

quote: Somewhere in the world, far from sorrow, in the very center of dreams—stay there a little longer.
author: Motino Originals

quote: May our eyes always find beauty, while we become the heroes of the roads we deserve.
author: Motino Originals

quote: The beauty of a city is shaped by the meaning we give it. For me: a new beginning, a little order, a little peace.
author: Motino Originals

quote: If you truly have a dream, everything else is only an excuse. Where you are and what you have matter less than wanting it enough.
author: Motino Originals

quote: Who knows how many people sat on these benches, sharing sorrow, sharing joy. Everyone needs someone they can speak freely with. If you have that, you are lucky.
author: Motino Originals

quote: Start change with yourself. Dream first. Then step outside the glass. Try, grow tired, but do not quit. When you change, the world changes too.
author: Motino Originals

quote: Life has its own mystery—carrying us places we never expected. Inside us, a quiet hope: let the days pass, let good news come.
author: Motino Originals

quote: May the beauty within us reach our smile. If the world outside feels messy, let the soul remain clean.
author: Motino Originals

quote: There are beautiful people in life—heroes of kindness that ask for nothing back. They arrive through the fog and change your whole day.
author: Motino Originals

quote: In a great city where only your name remains, leave every label behind. Bring your kind heart and whatever fits in your suitcase. Now you are here.
author: Motino Originals

quote: The lines beside your eyes when you smile in the mirror—they are made of love. Let them stay. Let them remind you that you were good to this world.
author: Motino Originals

quote: Do not make life heavier. Be graceful. Think clearly. Remove your limits. Open the door to new things. Change, improve, brighten. Give yourself a chance.
author: Motino Originals

quote: Dead end. The place where many choose to quit. You see a wall, someone else sees a path. Perspective builds every limit.
author: Motino Originals

quote: I never gave up in any season of my life. The most powerful inspiration has always been words earned through experience.
author: Motino Originals

quote: Life surprises us every day. It leaves gifts where we least expect them. We never know when, where, or with whom. We only know this: at the right time, we meet the right people.
author: Motino Originals

quote: Contrary to what many believe, life is not served on golden plates. Real success asks for effort—understood only by sacrificed sleep and those who chose to keep going.
author: Motino Originals

quote: We must walk our own road. With our own truths, our own beliefs, our own way of seeing life. Not competing with others, but becoming more of ourselves.
author: Motino Originals

quote: Sometimes we forget the experience that years gave us. Know yourself—what you can do, what you have done, your strongest sides, your brightest victories.
author: Motino Originals

quote: If you truly want it, there is very little you cannot do.
author: Motino Originals

quote: Even time can be fair. While teaching us patience, nature offers a deep breath—it helps, it heals.
author: Motino Originals

quote: You are never too early or too late for a city. If it is meant to be lived, it is the right time. That is why unfinished sentences stay in the mind—waiting for life to place the final period.
author: Motino Originals

quote: Moving to another country feels like discovering yourself again. A pause in life, then a fresh beginning. First, your perspective changes. Then your expectations become clear. And slowly, you become someone who redraws their own path.
author: Motino Originals

quote: Work hard. Even until you feel tired. But do it for yourself. So that one day, you have a story worth rewriting.
author: Motino Originals

quote: When was the last time you praised yourself? For every hope, every dream, every effort no one saw—do not wait for permission. Honour yourself first.
author: Motino Originals

quote: Perfectionists often judge themselves the most. They offer endless grace to others while forgetting their own heart. More compassion. More understanding. More kindness. Start with yourself.
author: Motino Originals

quote: Standing on your own feet is a brave expression. It means trying, learning, rebuilding, and rising. When life feels heavy, remember: what you can do is greater than what you fear you cannot.
author: Motino Originals

quote: Thoughtfulness is one of life’s finest qualities. I admire it. It feels elegant. And it always begins with empathy.
author: Motino Originals

quote: A little magic known by those who were read stories as children: one day a hero, the next day nothing. If you are not yet who you want to be, work for it, believe in miracles, and let life keep flowing.
author: Motino Originals

quote: Those who achieve success step beyond comfort and learn to move with change. I chose the same road—toward new beginnings, carrying courage, effort, and every beautiful feeling in my suitcase.
author: Motino Originals
